name: shangkong-website-suite
description: Aural Hushi Wind full-stack website, CMS admin, and API suite.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix aural-api install && npm --prefix aural-website install && npm --prefix aural-admin install
scripts.check:api: npm --prefix aural-api run check && npm --prefix aural-api run audit:prod && cd aural-api && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npx prisma validate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.build:admin: VITE_API_BASE=https://api.shangkong.xyz VITE_SITE_URL=https://www.shangkong.xyz npm --prefix aural-admin run build:prod
scripts.quality: npm run check:api && npm run build:admin && npm run build:website
